# function: cidr_filter_version

<!-- Edit here: this is the MarkdownDescription source for the burnham cidr_filter_version function. docs/functions/cidr_filter_version.md is generated from it by "go generate ./..."; do not edit the generated doc. -->

Returns only the CIDRs from `cidrs` that belong to the given IP `version` (4 or 6).

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Split a dual-stack list by family.
output "ipv4_only" {
  value = provider::burnham::cidr_filter_version(
    ["10.0.0.0/8", "2001:db8::/32", "fd00::/8"],
    4,
  )
  // → ["10.0.0.0/8"]
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidr_filter_version(cidrs list of string, version number) list of string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `cidrs` (List of String) The list of CIDRs to filter.
1. `version` (Number) The IP version to keep: 4 or 6.
